raw_text:
```json
{
  "distinct_claims": [
    "Senate Bill 68 will make it easier for property owners to convert to electricity powered homes and buildings.",
    "The legislation aims to clear barriers to clean energy homes and buildings in California.",
    "Senator Becker's bill addresses delays that homeowners face when converting to all-electric power.",
    "The California Energy Commission will gather and publish best practices for electrification of buildings.",
    "The bill aims to drive down costs of building electrification through technological advancements.",
    "The California Public Utilities Commission is required to set timeframes for utilities to respond to requests for electric heating and car charging support.",
    "Over 60% of greenhouse gas emissions in California come from electricity generation, buildings, and transportation.",
    "California has set a target to source 100% of its electricity from renewable and zero-carbon sources by 2045.",
    "President Biden has proposed a 2035 goal of 100% clean electricity nationwide.",
    "An executive order issued by Governor Jerry Brown aimed for California to achieve a 100% carbon neutral economy by 2045."
  ]
}
```
